channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Steph Curry, Warriors defense knock off Timberwolves on the road
item.description: The Warriors held Minnesota to 37 points in the first half and Steph Curry finished them out in the fourth.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Chiefs' Patrick Mahomes eases ankle injury concerns, sets personal rushing mark on touchdown run
item.description: Patrick Mahomes sustained an ankle sprain in the fourth quarter of a game against the Cleveland Browns last week. He was replaced by backup quarterback Carson Wentz.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lamar Jackson and the Ravens draw even atop the AFC North, beating the 1st-place Steelers 34-17
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson was solid in Baltimore's biggest game of the season so far. Then, after one of the star quarterback's rare slip-ups, one of his teammates delivered the play of the day.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jeremiyah Love overcomes injury and illness to propel Notre Dame into 1st Sugar Bowl since 2007
item.description: SOUTH BEND, Ind. (AP) — Notre Dame running back Jeremiyah Love wasted no time sending a message to his teammates Friday night. Nothing was going to derail the seventh-seeded Fighting Irish in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former walk-on DeLuca provides early spark, Penn State drills SMU 38-10 in CFP; Boise State up next
item.description: STATE COLLEGE, Pa. (AP) — In a time of incessant change, Penn State linebacker Dominic DeLuca is a throwback. The former walk-on's team might be one too. DeLuca was guaranteed nothing when he arrived on campus nearly four years ago without the promise of a scholarship or much of anything else.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiger Woods and son Charlie share the lead at PNC Championship
item.description: Tiger Woods and 15-year-old son Charlie ran off five straight birdies on the back nine Saturday for a 13-under 59 in the scramble format, giving them a share of the lead in the PNC Championship in Woods' first competition since back surgery in September.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Christian Walker agrees to $60 million, 3-year contract with Astros, AP source says
item.description: Gold Glove first baseman Christian Walker and the Houston Astros agreed Friday to a $60 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the agreement was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden admin withdraws proposed rule that would outlaw bans on trans athletes in girls' sports
item.description: Biden's Department of Education announced its withdrawal of a proposed rule that would have outlawed states from banning trans athletes in girls' sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pro pickleball players now earn more than WNBA, NWSL players
item.description: (KRON) -- The pickleball craze that's swept across the Bay Area and nation in recent years has apparently paid off, especially for female athletes. According to the Professional Pickleball Association, pro female players on the PPA Tour earned an average of $260,000 in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Winter Classic Day 2: Palisade boys show off versatility in big win over Moffat County
item.description: On day two of the annual Winter Classic presented by Family Health West, the Palisade Bulldogs took center stage on their home court.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Bucs' OC Liam Coen addresses NFL head coaching rumors
item.description: Tampa Bay Buccaneers' first-year offensive coordinator Liam Coen has been excellent calling plays for the Bucs this season.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trevor Baskin: From Division II star to Division I grinder
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — From Division II standout to Division I contributor, Trevor Baskin’s basketball journey has been anything but ordinary. After excelling at Colorado Mesa University, Baskin now competes at the highest level of college basketball with the Colorado Buffaloes.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Donato caps Blackhawks comeback, Blackhawks top Capitals 3-2
item.description: Ryan Donato scored his team-leading 11th goal with 2:18 left in regulation to cap Chicago's three-goal, third-period rally and lift the Blackhawks to a 3-2 win over the Washington Capitals on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: College hockey player sued by opponent over injury she suffered on the ice
item.description: A Michigan State University hockey player has been sued by a former opponent for injuries she suffered on the ice.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, WGN 9

item.title: Column: The Chicago Bears have no fire in the trenches
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — When it comes to what's wrong with the Chicago Bears, some argue it's coaching. Others dare to say it's Caleb Williams. Most toss it up to organizational dysfunction, or some supernatural hex inadvertently brought about by the McCaskeys being the McCaskeys.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Florida Gators look to tie a bow on season in Gasparilla Bowl against Tulane
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Union Home Mortgage Gasparilla Bowl hosts the Tulane Green Wave (9-4) representing the American Athletic Conference and the University of Florida Gators (7-5) from the Southeastern Conference.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears at Vikings preview: Injury updates, a look into recent matchups, and more
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS, Minn. (WGN) — The Chicago Bears travel to Minneapolis for Monday Night Football to face a surging Minnesota Vikings team that's won six straight and has a chance to tie the Detroit Lions for the NFC North lead in front of a national audience.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 3 Utah cowboys earn world champion titles at 2024 National Finals Rodeo
item.description: Three cowboys from Utah won world champion titles at the 2024 Wrangler National Finals Rodeo in Las Vegas on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4
